query:
SELECT r.name as region_name, r.code as region_code, c.name as country_name, pcr.startCode, pcr.endCode
FROM postal_code_ranges pcr
LEFT JOIN regions r ON pcr.regionId = r.id
LEFT JOIN countries c ON r.countryId = c.id
WHERE '75001' BETWEEN pcr.startCode AND pcr.endCode
LIMIT 5;
